user.title: Setup Osservaprezzi Carburanti
user.description:
Enter the station ID to monitor fuel prices.

How to find the station ID:
1. Go to carburanti.mise.gov.it/ospzSearch/zona
2. Search for and open the station details page
3. Copy the ID from the URL (for example, 1111 from .../dettaglio/1111)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the service
error.invalid_station: Invalid station ID or station not found

abort.already_configured: This configuration is already set up

init.title: Osservaprezzi Carburanti Options
init.description:
Configure integration options.

You can use https://crontab.guru to help build and validate cron expressions.

error.invalid_cron_expression: The cron expression is invalid. Example: 30 7 * * * (daily at 07:30). Visit https://crontab.guru for help building valid expressions.

parking.name: Camper/Truck Parking
parking.description: Parking area for campers and trucks

dump_station.name: Camper Dump Station
dump_station.description: Black or gray water dump point

force_csv_update.name: Force CSV update
force_csv_update.description: Forces an immediate download and refresh of the CSV station database for all configured stations.

clear_cache.name: Clear CSV cache
clear_cache.description: Clears the cached CSV station data and re-downloads a fresh copy.

compare_stations.name: Compare station prices
compare_stations.description: Returns a comparison of fuel prices across all configured stations.
